text:
# Cross-Model Check — xmodel-diff.patch

**Reviewer:** codex
**Primary author/model:** claude
**Mode:** code
**Date:** 2026-05-31
**Verdict:** Mixed
**Status:** ok

---

I’ll verify the diff against the local Nuxt app shape and the referenced helpers/types/assets so the findings are grounded in the surrounding code, not just the pasted patch.
The referenced markdown helper and new type files exist locally, so I’m checking their exact contracts and whether the static content/images actually line up with the routes.
**Verdict:** Mixed

## HIGH
- None

## MEDIUM
- `pages/compare/[slug].vue:23` and `pages/integrations/[slug].vue:23` render `Content unavailable` with HTTP 200 when markdown fetch fails; missing/renamed content should fail loudly with 404/500 for SEO pages.
- `nuxt.config.ts` has no sitemap/prerender/routeRules entry for the new pSEO routes; index links help discovery, but this does not give search crawlers an explicit route inventory.
- No regression check covers SSR markdown inclusion for `/compare/:slug` or `/integrations/:slug`; existing `test:markdown-rendering` only guards app board markdown paths.

## LOW
- `MarkdownRenderer.vue:34` only adds IDs to exact `<hN>...</hN>` tags; any future renderer/sanitizer change that preserves heading attributes will silently drop anchors.
- `MarkdownRenderer.vue:21` strips non-ASCII heading text, so localized headings collapse to `section-N` IDs.
- JSON-LD is injected via raw `innerHTML`; current constants are static, but future CMS/user-sourced FAQ text would need script-safe serialization.

## Likely-missed-by-primary
- The SSR data fetch path was fixed for crawlers, but the failure mode is still a thin canonical article page returning 200.
- The marketing copy asserts volatile pricing/product claims as “verified 2026-05-12”; I spot-checked Asana, Linear, and GitHub pricing pages and they currently align, but the diff has no freshness mechanism for ongoing pSEO claims.

## Notes
- Could not run `npm run typecheck` or build because the workspace is read-only.
- Sources spot-checked: https://asana.com/pricing, https://linear.app/pricing, https://github.com/pricing.
